title: elymus shouliangiae
intro: Elymus shouliangiae, also known as Shouliang grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elymus shouliangiae include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and improving digestion. Elymus shouliangiae can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
